postReview.title: Inter Miami 3-1 Seattle Sounders: Messi y Alba lideran la venganza de la final de la Leagues Cup
postReview.description: Inter Miami volvió a la senda de la victoria en la MLS al derrotar a los Seattle Sounders en casa, solo 16 días después de su derrota en la final de la Leagues Cup.

postReview.title: Inter Miami 3-1 Seattle Sounders: Messi e Alba guidano la rivincita nella finale della Leagues Cup
postReview.description: Inter Miami è tornata alla vittoria in MLS sconfiggendo i Seattle Sounders in casa, solo 16 giorni dopo la loro sconfitta nella finale della Leagues Cup.

postReview.title: Inter Miami 3-1 Seattle Sounders: Messi e Alba lideram revanche na final da Leagues Cup
postReview.description: O Inter Miami voltou a vencer na MLS ao derrotar o Seattle Sounders em casa, apenas 16 dias após a derrota na final da Leagues Cup.

postReview.title: Inter Miami 3-1 Seattle Sounders: Messi and Alba lead Leagues Cup final revenge
postReview.description: Inter Miami returned to winning ways in MLS as they defeated the Seattle Sounders at home, just 16 days after their Leagues Cup final loss.

postReview.title: Inter Miami 3-1 Seattle Sounders : Messi et Alba mènent la revanche en finale de Leagues Cup
postReview.description: Inter Miami a renoué avec la victoire en MLS en battant les Seattle Sounders à domicile, seulement 16 jours après leur défaite en finale de la Leagues Cup.

postReview.title: Inter Miami 3-1 Seattle Sounders: Messi und Alba führen bei Revanche im Leagues Cup-Finale
postReview.description: Inter Miami fand in der MLS zurück in die Erfolgsspur, indem sie zu Hause die Seattle Sounders besiegten, nur 16 Tage nach ihrer Niederlage im Leagues Cup-Finale.

postReview.title: إنتر ميامي 3-1 سياتل ساوندرز: ميسي وألبا يقودان الانتقام في نهائي كأس الدوريات
postReview.description: عاد إنتر ميامي إلى طريق الانتصارات في الدوري الأمريكي لكرة القدم بفوزه على سياتل ساوندرز في ملعبه، وذلك بعد 16 يومًا فقط من خسارتهم في نهائي كأس الدوريات.

postReview.title: Inter Miami 3-1 Seattle Sounders: Messi e Alba lideram revanche na final da Leagues Cup
postReview.description: O Inter Miami voltou às vitórias na MLS ao derrotar o Seattle Sounders em casa, apenas 16 dias após a derrota na final da Leagues Cup.
